CompanyReadonlyDetails: The Digital Shop customer should be able to view any relevant information about the Digital Shop entrepreneur in order to contact them if there is an issue with the order.
Currentordersdependingonthisitempleasede: Current orders depending on this item, please delete first in your company orders
CustomerReadonlyDetails: The Digital Shop entrepreneur should now be able to view any relevent information about the Digitial shop customer in order to deliver the products to them.

HELPBARCODE: If the Digital Shop entrepreneur has sent you their Digital Shop QR code or has it displayed on tables or at the Digital Shop location, you can use this scanner to read the unique QR code which will take you directly to the shop bypassing the Digital Shop map system.
HELPCOMPANYADDDETAILS: Add your new product information with or without a picture and click Save to finish.
HELPCOMPANYADDNAME: Add a Name for your Menu Group and click Save.
HELPCOMPANYGROUPANDROID: To Add, Edit or Delete a new group to your Digital Shop company hold down on the group that you have created and select Add, Edit or Delete options or just click once to add a new product. Please do not forget to enable the Group once you have finished or it will not show on your public Digital Shop.
HELPCOMPANYGROUPIPHONE: To Add, Edit or Delete a new group to your Digital Shop company Swipe left on the group that you have created and select Add, Edit or Delete options or just click once to add a new product. Please do not forget to enable the Group once you have finished or it will not show on your public shop.
HELPCOMPANYGROUPNOPIC: To Add, Edit or Delete a new group to your Digital Shop company click on the group that you have created and select Add, Edit or Delete buttons or just click once on the group to add a new product. Please do not forget to enable the Group once you have finished or it will not show on your public Digital Shop.
HELPCOMPANYGROUPWINDOWS10: To Add, Edit or Delete a new group to your Digital Shop company Right click on the group that you have created and select Add, Edit or Delete options or just click once to add a new product. Please do not forget to enable the Group once you have finished or it will not show on your public shop.
HELPCOMPANYPROFILE: This is the Digital Shop Company profile where you can add your company picture and customize as much as possible. Scroll this page for more options. It’s your shop so the more work you put into it the better it looks for your Digital Shop Customers. Buttons at the bottom left to right: 1st button, Create or view groups and Products for your Digital shop. 2nd button, view and manage any orders your Digital shop may have received from other Digital shop customers. Please use the buttons above to add your Company picture and Save.
HELPCOMPANYREGISTER: When you build Digital Shop for the first time it saves your current GPS location. So, make sure you are where you want your Digital shop to be! Click the Red Marker icon to continue or press back and move your phone to the preferred location!
HELPEDITDETAILSFULL: Edit your new product information with or without a picture and click Save to finish.
HELPEDITMENUDETAILSANDROID: To Add, Edit or Delete a new product to your Digital Shop company hold down on the product that you have created and select Add, Edit or Delete options or click once to edit. Please do not forget to enable the product once you have finished or it will not show on your public shop.
HELPEDITMENUDETAILSIPHONE: To Add, Edit or Delete a new product to your Digital Shop company Swipe left on the product that you have created and select Add, Edit or Delete options or click once to edit. Please do not forget to enable the product once you have finished or it will not show on your public shop.
HELPEDITMENUDETAILSNOPIC: To Add, Edit or Delete a new product to your Digital Shop company Click on the product that you have created and select Add, Edit or Delete buttons or click once to edit. Please do not forget to enable the product once you have finished or it will not show on your public shop.
HELPEDITMENUDETAILSWINDOWS10: To Add, Edit or Delete a new product to your Digital Shop company Right click on the product that you have created and select Add, Edit or Delete options or click once to edit. Please do not forget to enable the product once you have finished or it will not show on your public shop.
HELPFRONTDOOR: The Digital shop customer now sees the information on the shop that they want to interact with. Users cannot enter if the shop is shut unless no time was selected on the company profile. Please click the button bottom middle to enter shop or scroll for more info about the current Digital Shop.
HELPFRONTDOORGROUPS: You should now see groups on the public menu system for this current Digital Shop. Please Click a group in order to continue with your order. If no group are shown to click on, then the Digital Shop entrepreneur has not made these groups active in order for you to see!
HELPFRONTDOORPRODUCTS: If the Digital Shop entrepreneur has activated their products, then you should now see the products available for you to order. just scroll and click on the product that you want to order, if you want to order more than once then just click again or click back to select a different group. Once you have added everything you want to order please click the basket in the bottom middle.
HELPLIVEORDERSWINDOWS10: This screen shows the Digital Shop entrepreneur any active orders that they may currently have and is able to set if the order has been paid and or delivered. Clicking once on the order will show more detail of what has been ordered or if you Right click on the order you can then see more options for that order to either delete or view the customer Digital shop profile in order to help you deliver the order to them.
HELPLIVEORSERSANDROID: This screen shows the Digital Shop entrepreneur any active orders that they may currently have and is able to set if the order has been paid and or delivered. Clicking once on the order will show more detail of what has been ordered or if you Hold down on the order you can then see more options for that order to either delete or view the customer Digital shop profile in order to help you deliver the order to them.
HELPLIVEORSERSIPHONE: This screen shows the Digital Shop entrepreneur any active orders that they may currently have and is able to set if the order has been paid and or delivered. Clicking once on the order will show more detail of what has been ordered or if you Swipe left on the order you can then see more options for that order to either delete or view the customer Digital shop profile in order to help you deliver the order to them.
HELPLIVEORSERSNOPIC: This screen shows the Digital Shop entrepreneur any active orders that they may currently have and is able to set if the order has been paid and or delivered. Clicking once on the order will show more detail of what has been ordered or if you click a button on the order you can then see more options for that order to either delete or view the customer Digital shop profile in order to help you deliver the order to them.
HELPMAIN: Digital shop is an app that will allow you to create, customize a virtual shop and add products to that Digital Shop at your current GPS location. Digital Shop customers can then see your Virtual shop in the local area and can start ordering the products that you have on display. Digital shop is for everyone so you could be a restaurant or pub or just be someone selling food prepared at your home or a young person selling their old toys for some extra pocket money without delivery charges. Please click the Register button to register for Digital shop or click the Help off option to stop seeing the helpful Pop up messages!
HELPMAPMANY: This Map will show you any free Digital Shops that have been created in your current area. Click on the map marker to enter the shop.
HELPMAPTOP: This screen helps you find the Digital Shop in your local area. 1st button views free Digital Shops in your area using the map system. 2nd button views Paid Digital Shops in your current location using the map system. 3rd button, Digital shop scanner QR code to enter a shop without using the map system.
HELPORDERHISTORYANDROID: You can view any new order and see if it has been delivered or paid. If you click once on any order it will go to the next screen which will show you more information about what you have ordered. If you hold down on the order you will see the option to request to cancel the order or view the Digital Shop Company profile for you to contact them if required.
HELPORDERHISTORYIPHONE: You can view any new order and see if it has been delivered or paid. If you click once on any order it will go to the next screen which will show you more information about what you have ordered. If you Swipe left on the order you will see the option to request to cancel the order or view the Digital Shop Company profile for you to contact them if required.
HELPORDERHISTORYNOPIC: You can view any new order and see if it has been delivered or paid. If you click once on any order it will go to the next screen which will show you more information about what you have ordered. If you click a button on the order you will see the option to request to cancel the order or view the Digital Shop Company profile for you to contact them if required.

If you click once on any order it will go to the next screen which will show you more information about what you have ordered. If you Right click on the order you will see the option to request to cancel the order or view the Digital Shop Company profile for you to contact them if required.
HELPTOTALORDERSANDROID: Please scan through your order and if there is any item that you do not want to order just Hold down on that item and select the option to delete and this should remove it from your total order list. When you’re ready to order there may be up to 3 buttons to choose from. 1st button on the left is to say you are taking the products away. 2nd or middle button is, I’m on site so please hand me my order and the 3rd button on the right is I would like you to deliver the order to my address. Also, above the buttons there may be the option to select a table number if the Digital shop entrepreneur has enabled this in their company profile. After clicking the order button this should return you to your Digital shop user profile, and so completes the ordering process.
HELPTOTALORDERSIPHONE: Please scan through your order and if there is any item that you do not want to order just Swipe left on that item and select the option to delete and this should remove it from your total order list. When you’re ready to order there may be up to 3 buttons to choose from. 1st button on the left is to say you are taking the products away. 2nd or middle button is, I’m on site so please hand me my order and the 3rd button on the right is I would like you to deliver the order to my address. Also, above the buttons there may be the option to select a table number if the Digital shop entrepreneur has enabled this in their company profile. After clicking the order button this should return you to your Digital shop user profile, and so completes the ordering process.

When you’re ready to order there may be up to 3 buttons to choose from. 1st button on the left is to say you are taking the products away. 2nd or middle button is, I’m on site so please hand me my order and the 3rd button on the right is I would like you to deliver the order to my address. Also, above the buttons there may be the option to select a table number if the Digital shop entrepreneur has enabled this in their company profile. After clicking the order button this should return you to your Digital shop user profile, and so completes the ordering process.

When you’re ready to order there may be up to 3 buttons to choose from. 1st button on the left is to say you are taking the products away. 2nd or middle button is, I’m on site so please hand me my order and the 3rd button on the right is I would like you to deliver the order to my address. Also, above the buttons there may be the option to select a table number if the Digital shop entrepreneur has enabled this in their company profile. HELPUSERPROFILE: This is the User profile that the Digital Shop entrepreneur will use in order to locate you. So, the more info you add the better, scroll this page for more options. Buttons at the bottom left to right: 1st button, Create or view your Digital Shop company profile. 2nd button views free Digital Shops in your area using the map system. 3rd button views any current orders you may have with a Digital Shop entrepreneur. Please use the buttons above to add your profile picture and Save.
HELPUSERREGISTER: Enter your first name, last name and email address Which we will send you an activation email that you need to click on before you can enter Digital Shop. Password must be longer than 7 characters if you cannot think of a password then click the Keys icon that will generate a password for you. Enter your mobile number so that the Digital Shop entrepreneur can contact you if there is an issue. Enter your gender. and click Save and as long as there were no issues the system will return you to the main login screen.
